resourceTemplates.name: twitter-profile
resourceTemplates.title: Get Twitter profile
resourceTemplates.description: Returns Twitter/X profile information including stats and metadata using `username`, `url`, or `user_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: twitter-user-tweets
resourceTemplates.title: Get Twitter user tweets
resourceTemplates.description: Returns tweets from a user's profile using `username` or `user_id`, with pagination through `cursor` when supported.

resourceTemplates.name: twitter-tweet
resourceTemplates.title: Get tweet details
resourceTemplates.description: Returns detailed information for a specific tweet using `url` or `tweet_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: twitter-tweet-transcript
resourceTemplates.title: Get tweet transcript
resourceTemplates.description: Returns transcript data for a video tweet using `url` or `tweet_id`.

resourceTemplates.name: twitter-community
resourceTemplates.title: Get Twitter community
resourceTemplates.description: Returns details of a Twitter/X community using `community_id` or `url`.

resourceTemplates.name: twitter-community-tweets
resourceTemplates.title: Get Twitter community tweets
resourceTemplates.description: Returns tweets from a Twitter/X community using `community_id` or `url`, with pagination via `cursor` when available.
